title: Ubiquiti UBB, UniFi Building Bridge
description: UniFi Building Bridge is a 60GHz point-to-point wireless link with a 5GHz redundancy to extend your network to neighboring building. UBB has throughput is 1.7Gbps+ with a maximum 500m distance and managed or monitored via the UniFi Controller The UBB has an integrated LED illumination on the sides that indicates which direction the unit needs to be rotated to get a better signal (2) Device (2) Ball joint mount + lock ring on mast (2) Gigabit PoE power adapter 48V/0.32A (2) Power cord (2) Metal strap
specsSearch: Wireless features Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 866 Transmission speed - 60GHz [Mb/s] 1700 Output power 60GHz [dBm] 36,5 (EIRP) Elevation beam width (-6dB) [°] 30 Azimuth beam width (-6dB) [°] 60 Antenna gain [dBi] 17 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps GPS modul Yes Other features Bluetooth Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 48V DC Power type PoE Max. power consumption [W] 11 Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Weight [g] 376 Width [mm] 140 Height [mm] 140 Depth [mm] 90
